history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, styled hair and a serious expression sits on a motorcycle at night. He's wearing a black leather jacket with zippers and a black t-shirt underneath, with a subtle silver necklace visible. A black motorcycle helmet with the "KYT" logo is resting on the handlebars in front of him. The background features a dark, corrugated metal garage door on the left and a light-colored corrugated metal wall with a utility box mounted on it on the right. The ground is paved with patterned cobblestones. The lighting is dim and artificial, casting shadows and highlighting the man's face and the glossy texture of his jacket and helmet. The overall mood is cool, urban, and slightly brooding. The color palette is dominated by dark blacks, grays, and muted greens from the background, with a touch of silver from the necklace. The style is realistic, capturing the textures and details of the scene.
